name: dynamic-shapes-studio
description: Generatore di forme vettoriali dinamiche — standalone UI + libreria

scripts.build: npx esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=esm --outfile=dist/dynamic-shapes-studio.esm.js && npx esbuild src/index.js --bundle --format=iife --global-name=DynamicShapes --outfile=dist/dynamic-shapes-studio.iife.js
